evals.name: eval-full-suite
evals.prompt: Generate comprehensive QA test cases for the TimeKeeper project. The repo is at /tmp/theyTookOurJobs. Cover all 8 testing categories: Functional, API-REST, API-MCP, Database, UI/UX, Security, Permissions, and Edge Cases. Apply proper QA testing principles. Output a self-contained HTML report saved to /tmp/theyTookOurJobs/qa-test-report-2026-05-22.html
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML file with 30+ test cases across all 8 categories, each with TC-NNN numbering, title, preconditions, atomic steps with expected results, and overall expected result. The HTML must have working filter buttons, search, and stats header.

evals.name: eval-api-testing
evals.prompt: I need test cases focused on API testing for TimeKeeper - both the REST endpoints and the MCP tools. The project is at /tmp/theyTookOurJobs. Include negative tests, auth testing, and error responses. Generate an HTML report at /tmp/theyTookOurJobs/qa-api-test-report-2026-05-22.html
evals.expected_output: HTML report with 15+ API test cases covering REST and MCP endpoints. Should include: valid payloads, missing fields, wrong auth, 404s, 403s. Each TC has numbered steps and expected HTTP status codes in expected results.
